booking.cancelled_by_user.title: Booking Cancelled
booking.cancelled_by_user.body: Your booking for "{slot_title}" has been cancelled.

booking.cancelled_by_admin.title: Booking Cancelled by Admin
booking.cancelled_by_admin.body: Your booking for "{slot_title}"{event_label} was cancelled by an administrator.{detail}

slot.time_changed.title: Slot Time Changed
slot.time_changed.body: The time for slot "{slot_title}" has been updated. Please check the new schedule.

event.published.title: New Event Published
event.published.body: A new event "{event_name}" has been published. Check it out!

user.registered.title: New User Registered
user.registered.body: A new user "{name}" has registered and is pending approval.

user.approved.title: Account Approved
user.approved.body: Your account has been approved! You can now access all features.

user.rejected.title: Account Rejected
user.rejected.body: Your account request has been rejected.{detail}

email.footer_text: You received this because of your notification settings.
